notificationBar.text: Have an issue in your area? Raise it now.

hero.headline: Tamilisai Soundarajan. MBBS Doctor. Former Governor. Your Voice in Mylapore.
hero.subtext: From treating patients at Madras Medical College to serving as Governor of Telangana and Lt. Governor of Puducherry — I chose public service over practice. Now I'm here for Mylapore.

whoIAm.header: A doctor who chose to serve beyond the clinic.
whoIAm.point1: MBBS from Madras Medical College — practiced medicine before entering public life
whoIAm.point2: First woman BJP State President of Tamil Nadu — led the party for 5 years
whoIAm.point3: Served as Governor of Telangana & Lt. Governor of Puducherry
whoIAm.point4: Returned to grassroots politics to directly serve Mylapore constituency
whoIAm.point5: Known for free medical camps, women's health awareness, and accessible governance

trust.card2: I show up, not just during elections

achievements.card1desc: First woman to serve as Governor of Telangana (2019-2023). Opened Raj Bhavan to the public and conducted health awareness programs.
achievements.card2desc: Held additional charge as Lt. Governor of Puducherry (2021-2023). Focused on healthcare infrastructure and women's safety.
achievements.card3desc: First woman BJP State President of Tamil Nadu (2014-2019). Built the party's grassroots presence across every district.
achievements.card4desc: MBBS from Madras Medical College. Conducted hundreds of free medical camps. Led COVID vaccination drives during her governorship.

timeline.subtext: Built step by step. With people at the center.

items.title: Started with service, not politics
items.desc: Began through BJP medical wing focusing on healthcare

items.title: Became Governor of Telangana
items.desc: First woman Governor of the state

journeyMeaning.point1: I understand the system from inside
journeyMeaning.point2: I understand people from ground level
journeyMeaning.point4: I focus on solving, not speaking

ctaBanner.subtext: Every issue matters. Every voice counts.

pugaarPetti.heroSubtext: Your complaint. Your area. Your voice.
pugaarPetti.trustHeader: This is not just a form
pugaarPetti.trustLine1: This is a space to be heard
pugaarPetti.trustLine3: To build a better Mylapore together

otp.title: Verify your mobile
